name: DJ Performance
description: Immaculate Brazilian Zouk sets tailored to your event's vibe and audience.

name: Custom Sets
description: Curated playlists built around your event's theme, energy, or specific musical requests.

description: License recorded sets for socials, práticas, and small events. See Music Policies for details.

name: DJ Coaching & Classes
description: One-on-one and group instruction covering music theory, mixing, and energy management for Zouk DJs.
